# BrainCheck

> English conversation, English writing — BrainCheck is a minimalist app designed to help you focus on the essence of language learning through flashcard abstraction.

## Main Links

- [Home](https://braincheck.co.kr/en/): BrainCheck is an app for efficient English learning with AI-powered flashcards. Features ML recommendations, speech recognition evaluation, and high-quality TTS for natural pronunciation learning. Supports iOS, Android, Windows, macOS.
- [About](https://braincheck.co.kr/en/about.html): About BrainCheck. Founded by Younghun Lee, former AI Tech Leader at MagicX. Building an AI-powered flashcard learning platform focused on the essence of language learning.
- [Support](https://braincheck.co.kr/en/support.html): BrainCheck Support Center. For inquiries or assistance, contact us at admin@braincheck.co.kr. We'll respond promptly.
- [Privacy Policy](https://braincheck.co.kr/en/information.html): BrainCheck Privacy Policy. Information about personal data collected, purpose of use, retention period, and security measures.

## Technical Documentation

- [ML-Based Recommendation System](https://braincheck.co.kr/en/mlsystem.html): BrainCheck's machine learning-based spaced repetition recommendation system. Introducing the FSRS algorithm's performance and benchmark results.
- [High-Quality TTS](https://braincheck.co.kr/en/tts.html): BrainCheck's TTS background technology. Introducing CALM (Continuous Audio Language Models) and Pocket TTS for modern speech synthesis.
- [Speech Recognition (STT)](https://braincheck.co.kr/en/stt.html): BrainCheck's speech recognition background technology. Explaining the structure and features of modern STT technology centered on OpenAI's Whisper model.
- [AI Content Generation](https://braincheck.co.kr/en/ai-content.html): BrainCheck's AI-based learning content auto-generation background technology. Explaining the open LLM ecosystem and OpenLLaMA.
- [Multi-Platform Support](https://braincheck.co.kr/en/multiplatform.html): BrainCheck's multi-platform support technology. Explaining the iOS, Android, macOS, Windows support through Google's open-source Flutter framework.

## Download

- [App Store (iOS)](https://apps.apple.com/kr/app/%EB%87%8C%EC%B2%B4%ED%81%AC-%EC%98%81%EC%96%B4%ED%9A%8C%ED%99%94-%EC%98%81%EC%96%B4%EC%9E%91%EB%AC%B8/id6754181689)
- [Google Play (Android)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=kr.co.braincheck.bc&hl=ko)
